findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "start_takedown" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get the secure onboarding link to actually start a takedown. The content owner opens it once in a browser to identify themselves, sign the standing authorizatio…

description: Get the secure onboarding link to actually start a takedown. The content owner opens it once in a browser to identify themselves, sign the standing authorization (the one step that legally requires a human), and provide proof of ownership. Returns the link plus what to prepare and what happens next.
